## Summary

Describe the change in a few sentences. Focus on the user-facing or package-facing outcome.

## Change Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Build / release / tooling

## Affected Scope

- [ ] `packages/core`
- [ ] `packages/react`
- [ ] `packages/vue`
- [ ] `packages/web`
- [ ] Docs / README
- [ ] CI / release

## What Changed

- 

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Not run

Validation notes:

```text
Paste command output, environment notes, or explain why validation was skipped.
```

## Screenshots or Demo

Add screenshots, recordings, or before/after comparisons when the change affects UI or SVG output.

## Release Notes

- [ ] No release note needed
- [ ] Patch
- [ ] Minor
- [ ] Major / breaking change

If a release note is needed, describe it here:

```text
Example: add URL serialization helpers for restoring deterministic avatar configs.
```

## Checklist

- [ ] The PR title is clear and specific
- [ ] The change is scoped and does not include unrelated edits
- [ ] Docs were updated when behavior or API changed
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests, or the gap is explained
- [ ] Breaking changes are clearly called out
